title: Charry's Tungsten
description: It's like an in-between tier of Iron and Diamond...  some kind of Tungsten.
body:
![Charry's Tungsten logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a466059feee43b2e5608114e24ecb3962ef30ca.png)

# A complete revival of my old Tungsten mod from 2021!

![NeoForge banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8796e24aec1c216f0a121b4870ec6bf2d29c0fe2.png)

# This mod requires NeoForge 21.1.203 or higher!

![Tungsten items and blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d1285a2cc8b692b9cf9f1bbad0f42b143fa509.png)

# Basic info

Like the title suggests, this mod adds in a new material, Tungsten.

Tungsten is a dense metal, with the mining strength of diamond but attack power slightly above iron.

Iron is needed to break the ore.

The ore spawns from Y45 to Y-64.

To obtain the Tungsten tools and armor, you simply use a Tungsten smithing template on Iron gear like you would a Netherite smithing template with Diamond gear.

![tungsten smithing template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0823bb4ed21a65a3b74ea263e35de75cf1c3cc1.gif)

To craft the Tungsten smithing template, you craft it as shown below.

![tungsten smithing upgrade recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c18e386518f0bfd7bfe4303c77a0c61b69481b2e.png)

Tungsten is more durable and tougher than Diamond. Has less attack damage but high enchantability.

![Tungsten ore naturally generated in stone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38ab43eb3898bc07064710f54c790bc9020bf0fe_0.webp)
![Tungsten ore naturally generated in deepslate.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2e91d0402b4ecff05ff234f756010f30012431e_0.webp)

The Tungsten block texture is a placeholder. Will be reworked in a future update.

Special thank you to my friend [Potota](https://modrinth.com/user/Potota)! He helped me alot with programming this! (This is my first mod without MCreator!!!)
